name: Istituto di Istruzione Superiore "Giulio Natta"
message: [AI generated] Istituto di Istruzione Superiore "Giulio Natta" is an educational institution located in Italy, named after the renowned Italian chemist Giulio Natta. It offers a variety of secondary education programs, focusing on scientific and technical disciplines. The school emphasizes both theoretical knowledge and practical skills, preparing students for higher education and professional careers.
